**PK model status:**  
From the dosing config alone, the parameters look internally consistent and I don’t see any obvious anomalies in dose, interval, or listed clearance values. Patient notes also suggest the current dosing plans are holding up reasonably well. That said, this file is a parameter file, not a live model-monitoring output, so I can’t fully confirm PK model stability from it alone.

If you want, I can format this into a short note/report for Dr. Martinez.
